## 24h Severity Breakdown

| Severity | Volume | Share |
|---|---|---|
| (untagged) | 4.5 GB | 83% |
| ERROR | 465 MB | 8.6% |
| DEBUG | 219 MB | 4% |
| INFO | 127 MB | 2% |
| TRACE | 98 MB | 2% |
| CRITICAL | 2.2 MB | <1% |

83% of demo-env volume carries no severity_level tag. ERROR is the second-largest tier at ~8.6%. CRITICAL is rare.
